name: scope
description: Used for limiting authorization to certain features or areas

properties.name: key
properties.description: A key used for identifying this scope

properties.name: parent id
properties.description: ID of the scope that contains this scope. None if this is a root-level scope.

name: scope right
description: Links a scope to an authentication method that grants that scope

properties.name: scope id
properties.description: ID of the granted or accessible scope

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this scope right was added to the database

properties.name: usable
properties.description:
Whether the linked scope is directly accessible. 
False if the scope is only applied when granting access for other authentication methods.

name: token
description: Represents a token that may be used for authorizing certain actions

properties.name: template id
properties.description: ID of the template used when creating this token

properties.name: hash
properties.description: Hashed version of this token

properties.name: parent id
properties.description: ID of the token that was used to generate this token

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of this token. May be empty.

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this token was created

properties.name: expires
properties.description: Time when this token automatically expires. None if this token doesn't expire automatically.

properties.name: revoked
properties.description: Time when this token was revoked.

name: token grant right
description: Used for allowing certain token types (templates) to generate new tokens of other types

properties.name: owner template id
properties.description: ID of the token template that has been given the right to generate new tokens

properties.name: granted template id
properties.description: ID of the template applied to the generated tokens

properties.name: revokes original
properties.description: Whether generating a new token revokes the token used for authorizing that action

properties.name: revokes earlier
properties.description:
Whether earlier generated tokens should all be revoked when generating new tokens. 
Uncertain if this may be controlled manually.

name: token scope
description: Allows a token to be used in some scope

properties.name: scope id
properties.description: ID of the granted or accessible scope

properties.name: token id
properties.description: ID of the token that grants or has access to the linked scope

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this scope right was added to the database

properties.name: usable
properties.description:
Whether the linked scope is directly accessible. 
False if the scope is only applied when granting access for other authentication methods.

name: token template
description: A template or a mold for creating new tokens

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of this template. May be empty.

properties.name: scope grant type
properties.description: Way the scope-granting functions in this template

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Duration of the created tokens. None if infinite.

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this token template was added to the database

name: token template scope
description: Links a (granted) scope to a token template

properties.name: scope id
properties.description: ID of the granted or accessible scope

properties.name: template id
properties.description: ID of the template that grants this scope

properties.name: created
properties.description: Time when this scope right was added to the database

properties.name: usable
properties.description:
Whether the linked scope is directly accessible. 
False if the scope is only applied when granting access for other authentication methods.
